name: us_finance_search
description: Search US economic indicators, real estate data, oil prices, taxation info, and government programs.
description_for_agent: Search US & Canada financial data: economic indicators (FRED/BLS), real estate trends, oil/energy prices, state taxation tables, government financing programs. Use when user asks about US economy, interest rates, unemployment, housing market, oil prices, state taxes, or business grants. Parameters: query (search text), section (optional: news/real_estate/oil/programs/taxation), limit (max results, default 20).

query.description: Search text across US finance data (indicators, real estate, oil, programs).

section.description: Filter by section: news, real_estate, oil, programs, taxation. Leave empty for all.

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return. Default: 20.
